basics.name: Daniel Anchondo
basics.label: Software Engineer · AI-Native Developer & Tech Lead
basics.summary: Software Engineer with 5+ years building high-performance products with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Python. AI-native developer: I build custom MCP servers, Skills, and agentic workflows (Claude Code, Cursor) and ship LLM features to production. As a Tech Lead, I've driven AI adoption to accelerate delivery without sacrificing quality.

work.name: Gluo/Orium
work.summary: Building the main site and promotional pages for a client with NextJS, TailwindCSS, and Contentful as a CMS. I drive AI-augmented development across the team — building custom MCP servers and Skills with Claude Code and Cursor to standardize and accelerate our workflow while keeping quality high.
highlights: Built custom MCP servers and Skills to standardize AI-augmented workflows across the team.
Accelerated delivery by introducing agentic coding practices (Claude Code, Cursor) without sacrificing quality.
Built reusable, content-driven components integrated with Contentful CMS.

work.name: We Book You
work.summary: Led a team of 4-6 developers to build and deploy a main MVP and a white-label solution, leveraging React, NextJS, Python, and FastAPI. Managed full-stack development and deployment using AWS and Vercel, optimizing performance and scalability.
highlights: Reduced client onboarding time by 20% through white-label solution.
Optimized front-end performance, reducing load times by 15%.

work.name: Trescento
work.summary: Co-founded and led the technical integration between various products, transitioning from a monolithic architecture to a modern, flexible solution. Drove adoption of best practices, enhancing product delivery speed and user satisfaction.
highlights: Successfully migrated to a microservices architecture.
Implemented a performance-oriented culture, improving team efficiency by 25%.

work.name: Cura Deuda
work.summary: Joined as a Front-End Developer and was promoted to Technical Lead within the first year. Started by delivering key integrations (Credit Bureau, payment gateways, KYC) with React and JavaScript, then went on to lead a cross-functional team overseeing Front-End and Back-End development and optimizing performance across the stack.
highlights: Promoted to Tech Lead within the first year, leading a cross-functional team.
Delivered third-party integrations (Credit Bureau, payment gateways, KYC), improving customer onboarding by 40%.
Led key features that increased user engagement by 30% and reduced server costs by 15%.
Streamlined Front-End/Back-End integration, reducing bug occurrences by 20%.

education.institution: Universidad Tecnológica del Norte de Coahuila

projects.description: Website and interactive web app for solar panel installation quotations.

Configured automated email notifications for quote submissions and customer inquiries.

highlights: Built with Next.js 16, React 19, and Tailwind CSS 4.
Designed a custom "Modern Sanctuary" design system with editorial typography.
Integrated YouTube API for seamless sermon streaming.

projects.description: Landing page for a fintech providing financial services in the leasing sector in Mexico.
highlights: Built using Vue, Nuxt 3 for modern web application architecture.
Tailored solutions to meet specific client requirements.

Delivered a custom-built solution for the client's consulting needs.

highlights: Replicated key UI/UX features of Figma.
